surface_strategies.product_cards: bg-white border border-gray-200/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
surface_strategies.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.badges: bg-green-50 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

components.button_primary: bg-[#166534] text-white hover:bg-[#14532D] px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors
components.input_field: bg-white border border-gray-300 focus:border-[#166534] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#166534] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 w-full transition-all

image_urls.description: Modern electric scooter parked, representing urban green mobility.
White and black modern electric scooter (Aero EV1).
Black and red sporty electric scooter (Velocity X).
Black and green rugged electric scooter (EcoRider Pro).
Minimalist black commuter electric scooter (City Glide).

instructions_to_main_agent.project_context: B.Com Computer Applications student project by Yash Mahatale, Sudanshu Zade, Mayur Kawale. Guide: Mrs. Bhagyashree Ambulkar at GH Raisoni College. Include these credits visibly in the footer.
key_pages_required: Landing Page (Hero, Product Grid, Sustainability section)
Product Detail Page (Full specs, gallery, add to cart)
instructions_to_main_agent.design_notes: Use Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). Make the UI look premium but simple enough for a student to explain. Use pure Tailwind for layout, Shadcn for interactive components (dropdowns, dialogs, forms). Use Lucide React for icons. Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings; stick to Outfit.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_notes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cart items) must have data-testid attributes.
